description: Domain taxonomy for health, transport, and panda public opinion knowledge packages. This file guides members responsible for domain materials and keeps downstream Schema/Graph RAG fields consistent.

health.name: 健康舆情
health.description: Covers medical disputes, public health, tobacco control, doctor-patient relations, hospital management, and health policy communication.

transport.name: 交通舆情
transport.description: Covers railway, high-speed rail, aviation, ride-hailing, bus, road safety, ticketing fairness, and transport service disputes.

panda.name: 大熊猫舆情
panda.description: Covers animal welfare, zoo management, tourism branding, live streaming, fandom communities, cross-region sentiment, and animal ethics disputes.
recommended_tactics: 动物健康状态透明披露

annotation_rules: Every domain case should explicitly fill trigger_points, key_claims, public_sentiment, escalation_path, official_response, resolution, and lessons_learned when information is available.
Every domain risk pattern should explicitly fill trigger_conditions, early_warning_signals, typical_escalation_path, and recommended_tactics.
Every response tactic should explicitly fill stage, actions, message_templates, do_and_dont, success_metrics, and failure_modes.
Use confidence between 0.0 and 1.0. Use status=candidate before manual review and status=approved after review.
Keep source_path/source_url/evidence_refs whenever possible for traceability.
